---
title: "Example queries"
---

Things you can ask your agent once BAIT is loaded. Each links to the matching **cookbook
recipe** (the standardized answer the agent uses and adapts).

## Data questions

- **"What is the largest cod in the database?"**
  → [`largest-cod`](https://github.com/DeepWaterIMR/BAIT/blob/main/cookbook/largest-cod.md)
- "How many haddock were measured per year on the surveys?"
- "Which cruises sampled Greenland halibut in 2023?"
- "List the species caught on the winter survey."

## Maps

- **"Make a map of cusk caught on the EggaN surveys."**
  → [`map-cusk-eggan`](https://github.com/DeepWaterIMR/BAIT/blob/main/cookbook/map-cusk-eggan.md)
- **"Map all spurdog in ICES areas 1 and 2."**
  → [`pigghaa-ices-1-2`](https://github.com/DeepWaterIMR/BAIT/blob/main/cookbook/pigghaa-ices-1-2.md)
- "Interactive leaflet map of cod catches, coloured by year."
- **"Catch-composition pie charts per station for the coastal survey."**
  → [`catch-composition-coastal`](https://github.com/DeepWaterIMR/BAIT/blob/main/cookbook/catch-composition-coastal.md)

## Life-history

- **"Make a maturity ogive for ling using Coastal survey data."**
  → [`maturity-ogive-ling-coastal`](https://github.com/DeepWaterIMR/BAIT/blob/main/cookbook/maturity-ogive-ling-coastal.md)
- "Fit a von Bertalanffy growth curve for redfish and give me L∞ and K."
- "Length–weight relationship for saithe, with the a and b parameters."

## Dashboards

- "Launch BioticExplorer so I can browse the data."
- "Build me a small Shiny dashboard to filter catches by species and map them."

## Maintenance

- "Set up the Biotic database."
- "Update the database to the latest data."

::: {.callout-note}
## The list grows
Every new question your team solves can become a recipe. See
[Contributing](https://github.com/DeepWaterIMR/BAIT/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
:::
